chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-342 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 07.08.2017 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Chandio, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w ASI Muhammad Yousuf of P.S Model District Badin. = With reference to the order of previous date, learned Additional A.G files statements/comments of the respondents No.2 and 3, which are taken on record and copies whereof have been supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioner. It is stated in the comments that the police officials have never rendered inconvenience to the petitioner and further undertakes that they will not cause any harassment to the petitioner and will provide protection to the petitioner strictly in accordance with law, whereas, the petitioner may approach the said official respondents. Learned Counsel for the petitioner has no objection for the disposal of the present petition, if directions are given to the respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioner. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with the directions to the respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioner and further that the police officials should discharge their duties in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner, whenever he approaches them with such request, but strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
